summary: First-finish latency-sensitive E2E test for Palaniyappa Mess site. Backend health, all 3 form POST/GET endpoints, and full frontend flows (hero, theme toggle+persist, WhatsApp FAB, menu filter+order links, reservation, contact, newsletter idempotency, gallery lightbox, map embed, mobile menu) all working. No blockers found.
passed: POST /api/reservations returns 200 with created doc + UUID + created_at
POST /api/newsletter returns 200; duplicate email returns same doc (idempotent verified — same id both calls)
Hero renders 'Palaniyappa' with CTAs hero-view-menu, hero-order-now, hero-contact-link
Theme toggle switches html class (dark <-> light) and persists to localStorage key 'palaniyappa-theme'
WhatsApp FAB href = https://wa.me/919942933912 with prefilled text
Menu filter (filter-biryani) filters grid; order-<id> link points to wa.me/919942933912 with encoded dish/price text
Reservation form submit shows success toast
Contact form submit (after clicking tab-contact) shows 'Message sent!' toast
Newsletter submit shows 'You're on the list' toast
Gallery item click opens Radix dialog lightbox
Mobile menu toggle present and opens nav drawer at 390px viewport

warnings.issue: Radix DialogContent missing DialogTitle — a11y console warning (not a functional bug)

action_items: Optional: wrap gallery lightbox DialogTitle in VisuallyHidden to silence Radix a11y warning
